data.name: 爆乳劍士淪為玩物
data.detailed_description:
■NTR寧死不從的巨乳騎士團長，讓其成為玩物！
剛毅，堅強的巨乳騎士團長上司。第一次交到了年輕小男友的大奶玩物體型的處女小穴被我破處，比起小兒科的憐愛，我選擇用舒服的性交來掠奪她！就算很強，有喜歡的人，也還是敵不過我的雞雞！母狗本能暴露無遺，成為了我專用的玩物！

■充滿NTR場景！
為了守護戀人而獻上自己的處女，戀人就在旁邊卻還偷摸口交，隔著門和戀人對話的同時被操，在和戀人一起待過的房間被開發後庭，丟下戀人被中出，使用認知魔法，在戀人面前的變態露出，穿著下流的情趣內衣，隔著門對話的同時無套深入，NTR宣言&放棄做騎士的魔法放鬆等等大量NTR場景！用雞雞和精子將本是他人所有的爆乳騎士變成自己的東西！

■大量女性調情狀態！
很不情願，雖然肉體淪陷了，但心理還想著自己的戀人。雖然這種狀態下的中出做愛很多，但在讓其淪陷後還是可以玩到一開始不情願時的體位！有著想看女人滿臉發情地崇拜雞雞狀態的玩家也能滿足的超多內容。

■也有很多懷孕做愛場景！
你可以欣賞到一個不情願放棄自己身體的剛強騎士被NTR的語音，以及一個完全沉迷於雞雞的色情語音！所有語音沒有屏蔽!

■發情聲全語音！
你可以享受到對宅男溫柔，嚴厲的辣妹們沉迷雞雞，發出母狗叫般的色情全語音！淫語和調情的台詞，高潮台詞，懷孕台詞等等等等，盡情享受所有的語音吧！

  • 官方漢化版
  • 高清16:9和4:3圖質。
  • 幾小時的內容。
  • 所有美女帶有日文/中文語音。
  • 帶有角色動態。
  • 帶有收藏展覽。


「爆乳劍士淪為玩物」由著名日本製作室 Norn/Miel所創作,並由櫻桃吻吻正式漢化, 把日本遊戲帶到全世界。

data.short_description: 巨乳騎士團長，最有彈性的胸部和最肥碩的屁股，如今竟被我迷的昏天黑地？ ！讓她成為專屬於自己的玩物！
data.supported_languages:
英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

data.name: Oppai Samurai: Knocked up by a No Name Novice
data.detailed_description:
Disaster strikes during a training exercise for up and coming Monster Slayers as they are overwhelmed by an unexpected threat! Thankfully the strongest Monster Slayer of them all, Itsuki the monster exterminator, slayer of over 100 monsters, owner of the biggest pair of titties the world has ever seen! Its not the life threatening danger but instead the visual feast that is Itsuki in her full monster slaying regalia that really has his heart racing!

Itsuki's cavern of milky cleavage, two big bouncy breasts that would make watermelons look small, her soft creamy thighs pinched by her sheer black thigh highs, and a tight white skirt holding back a supremely juicy booty! As Itsuki takes down the monster in one flaming sword strike all the other trainees might be filled with feelings of awe or even fear at her strength, there our protagonist sits dick in hand beating his meat mind over flowing with lust and desire watching Itsuki's stacked body bounce and jiggle as she takes the beast out.

With the monster defeated Itsuki senses another presence behind her, as she turns to face a new foe she comes face to face with a Miel Protagonist's cock! At this point we all know how this is going to go down the unrivaled erotic energy surges forth from our protagonist's "sword" holding her in place with a mysterious power! So begins Itsuki's decent into degeneracy, her training to become the ultimate sex toy is fierce! We're talking blowjobs, tit-fucks, womb-stuffing creampies, even some forbidden Monster Slayer techniques as she faces off against vicious beasts with an ass full of anal beads! She was once known for her peerless sword technique but you'll make sure she becomes ever more skilled with a different kind of sword before too long as she trains to become the ultimate cock-sleeve!


  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel
  • All the Monster Slaying madams are fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue
  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants
  • Hours of story content
  • Audio including music and special effects
  • Enhanced with character sprite animations
  • Gallery and Scene selections
  • A Scene Studio to view all the beautifully drawn sprites and backgrounds
  • 19 sexy scenes of sensual sex-toy training

Oppai Samurai: Knocked up my a No Name Novice Is the English localization of a Visual Novel originally created by prolific Japanese developer Miel. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

** PLEASE NOTE **
All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual, nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
